name: Stafford James
abstract: Stafford James (born April 24, 1946) is an American double-bassist and composer.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Charles Mingus Quintet, Max Roach Quartet, and Art Blakey and The Jazz Messengers

works.t: Anything Goes: I Get a Kick Out of You

concerts.label: Tribute to Charles Mingus: Mingus Music
Kinetics: Jazz Compositions by Walter Lee

about_quotes.speaker: Louis Hayes
about_quotes.evidence: I got Junior Cook and Ron Matthews and Stafford James... So it was the Louis Hayes-Junior Cook Quintet featuring Woody Shaw.
about_quotes.doc_title: Louis Hayes interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 29, 2000

about_quotes.speaker: Benny Powell
about_quotes.evidence: This was taken on a tour with Randy Weston... This is Randy of course, this is Talib Kibwe, this is Stafford James and me
about_quotes.doc_title: Benny Powell interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 16, 1999 [interview 2 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Randy Weston
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] Stafford James? [INTERVIEWEE] No, not Stafford. It’ll come to me.
about_quotes.doc_title: Randy Weston — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Teddy Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] ...a very good bass player named Stafford James. Excellent.
